name: PNET_TRG_PAYTRANS_223_01
definition:
CREATE TRIGGER PNET_TRG_PAYTRANS_223_01 ON LG_223_01_PAYTRANS
                    AFTER DELETE
                    AS
                    INSERT INTO PNET_BNK_REMINDERDEL_223_01 (PAYTRANSREF, DELDATE, ISSUCCESS)
                    SELECT LOGICALREF,GETDATE(), 0 FROM DELETED;
